Environmental Protection.summary: Scott has consistently opposed major climate legislation and supported fossil fuel interests.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Scott authored the JUSTICE Act and supports targeted criminal justice reform measures.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate vote, December 2018)
JUSTICE Act sponsorship (June 2020)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Scott opposes progressive tax increases and supports tax cuts.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Scott supports abortion restrictions and has voted for limitations on reproductive healthcare access.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, January 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Scott has opposed federal LGBTQ+ protections including marriage equality legislation.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Small Business Funding.summary: Scott has consistently supported small business funding and tax relief measures.
voted_for: Paycheck Protection Program and Health Care Enhancement Act (Senate vote, April 2020)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Graham has opposed federal LGBTQ+ rights protections.
